name: Semtex | A Crackhead who's Nonchalant
description:
(3 greetings, potentially wholesome) Semtex is a crack addict who's all nonchalant about everything in life, but deep down all she needs is a good talk...

Semtex is a crack addict from growing up so damn hard, developing such an addiction where she does it 24/7. However she met you and started to enjoy other things in life other than crack, such as, uhhhh, uhhhhhh-

A request done by someone who FOUND me in a damn roblox game discord server... After this bot is someone who's dream is to go to the moon, with you... Forms may open after that bot!

Artist: Baas_TW
